accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; timelines and OMB role correctly described.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose as establishing timelines for fishery disaster spend plan review and funding.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes the amendment to Magnuson-Stevens Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the conditional nature of spend plan content requirements.

effective_dates.why: No explicit effective date beyond enactment; not applicable.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all major provisions: 120-day submission, 10-day review, 90-day funding, OMB concurrent review restriction.

correct_entities.why: Magnuson-Stevens Act and OMB correctly identified.
